notes: CDNF = disjunction (a DNF, def:disjunctive-normal-form) of the row conjunctions (def:truth-table-row-conjunction) for the true rows (def:truth-table); def:empty-clause (the empty disjunction = bottom) handles the contradiction edge case (no true rows). Correctly dual to CCNF (0064): empty-conjunction->top there, empty-clause/empty-disjunction->bottom here. All four load-bearing and present.
